title: ESMP - Light
description: A lighter modpack made for the ESMP Minecraft Server, focused on performance and essential quality-of-life improvements without heavy or visual mods.
body:
# ESMP - Light Modpack


This Modpack is made for the ESMP players with performance in mind. 

---

This modpack will improve the experience on the server due to the performance mods & Voice Chat Mod to communicate through Proximity Chat in-game with other players.

---

This is a completely Optional modpack. It is not needed in order to join the server but it does improve the experience on the server.

---

The Modpack is similar to the Standard version, However it has fewer mods and is purely made for Performance & Voice Chat.

If you want a version with more mods that enhance your experience you can use the Standard version listed below.

---

**Some of the mods included are:**

```
Sodium
Mod Menu
Entity Culling
Simple Voice Chat
WI Zoom
```
---

**Standard version >>** [ESMP - Standard](https://modrinth.com/modpack/esmp 'ESMP - Standard')
